title: Carrier Command: Gaea Mission

notes: Runs out of the box without tweaks, but map textures are broken and it crashed at one checkpoint. No problem with gamma. Performance is flawless.

notes: Performance is generally good, map screen textures aren't working and some of the first person  levels in buildings appear to have an issue with lighting, making it near impossible to find your way around in the dark. After about an hour experienced a crash as well.
title: Carrier Command: Gaea Mission
